title: Verification, not generation, is the bottleneck in AI coding
abstract: Struggling with the "verification" bottleneck in AI coding? Fear not—this tool is here to help break through that barrier! Think of it as a lifesaver in the world of programming, saving you from tedious verification processes. Dive right in and tackle those challenges effortlessly!
abstract_zh: 你还在为AI编码里“验证”这关卡住而挠头吗？别担心，这款工具就是来帮你打破瓶颈的！它就像是编程界的救星，让你不再为繁琐的验证过程头疼。
